  • Uses of TransactionCostEstimateResult in grafioschtrader.service

    Methods in grafioschtrader.service that return TransactionCostEstimateResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TransactionCostEstimateResult
    TransactionCostEvalExEstimator.estimate(TransactionCostEstimateRequest request)
    Estimates transaction costs by evaluating the YAML fee model on the given TradingPlatformPlan.
    TransactionCostEstimateResult
    TransactionCostEvalExEstimator.estimateWithOptionalYaml(TransactionCostEstimateRequest request)
    Estimates transaction costs using inline YAML if provided, otherwise falls back to the DB-based plan lookup.
    TransactionCostEstimateResult
    TransactionCostEvalExEstimator.evaluateYaml(String yaml, TransactionCostEstimateRequest request)
    Evaluates a fee model YAML string directly (without loading from DB), useful for testing.
